response.reasoning: The role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and strong AI/cloud expertise, ideally with recognized AI products and advanced AI-related degrees. The candidate has roughly 14-16 years of professional software experience (depending on how freelance/overlapping roles are counted) across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems. Recent role at re:cinq (2025-present) touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is relevant but limited in tenure. Prior experience is solid full-stack and craftsmanship-oriented (TDD, CI/CD, microservices at scale at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby), but there is no evidence of director-level IC influence, strategic advisory work with customers/partners, or recognized AI products/platforms. No advanced degree in AI, no demonstrated AI product leadership, and limited cloud-architecture depth at the scale a Principal/Director IC role typically requires. Strong engineering breadth and entrepreneurial signal (GISCollective founder) partially offset this.
strengths: Broad 15-year engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial signal as founder of GISCollective open-source platform with real users
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI products, platforms, or publications demonstrating AI expertise at a Principal level
Lacks evidence of Director-level IC scope, strategic advisory, or executive-facing influence
Limited deep cloud architecture experience; no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and recognized AI products
Director-level IC scope and strategic influence
Engineering breadth and entrepreneurial founder experience

response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship roots and some recent AI-agent tooling exposure, but the résumé does not demonstrate the recognized AI expertise, cloud architecture depth, or director-level strategic influence this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires. Suitable for a senior IC track, but a stretch for this specific position.
